name: pharos-kitchen-design
description: Pharos Kitchen Design (Project Prism) - High-rigor BIM interoperability layer.

scripts.test:container: podman build -t pkd-test -f Containerfile.test . && podman run --rm pkd-test
scripts.infra: podman run --rm -it -v $(pwd)/infra/cloud:/infra:Z -e AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID -e AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY -e AWS_REGION -e CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN -e TF_VAR_aws_account_id -e TF_VAR_cloudflare_account_id pkd-infra
scripts.audit:registries: grep -E '^FROM\s+([^/.]+|docker\.io)/' $(find . -maxdepth 3 -name 'Containerfile*') && echo 'Violation: Low-Rigor registry found.' && exit 1 || echo 'Registry audit passed.'

author: Richard D. (https://github.com/iamrichardd)
